ham.subject: Out of Office: Sarah Thompson is away
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to let you know that I will be out of the office from **Monday, 9 May 2026** to **Friday, 13 May 2026**, returning on **Monday, 16 May 2026**. During this period, I will have limited access to email and may not respond promptly.

If you need immediate assistance, please reach out to **John Miller (john.miller@company.com)** or **Emily Davis (emily.davis@company.com)**, who will be covering for me.

Thank you for your understanding and I will get back to you as soon as I return.

Best regards,
Sarah Thompson
Senior Project Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Scheduled Zoom Meeting – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Colleague,

You are hereby invited to a **mandatory Zoom meeting** scheduled for **Tuesday, 10 May 2026 at 10:00 AM (EDT)**. This session is critical for the upcoming project review and your participation is required.

**Meeting Details**:
- **Link**: <URL>
- **Meeting ID**: 123‑456‑7890
- **Password**: **ABCDEF**

Please confirm your attendance by replying to this email **before 8 May 2026**. If you are unable to attend, let us know immediately so we can make alternative arrangements.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
Compliance Office

---
*Please note: This invitation is generated automatically. If you did not request this meeting, please ignore this message.*
